subcodes.first_line: O tender branch that hath sprouted forth in the Paradise of the All-Glorious! Soon shall thy father behold thee as a verdant and flourishing tree, refreshed by heavenly bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها القضیب الرطیب الناشی فی جنه الابهی فسوف یراک والدک شجره نضره ریانه بفیض
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @development of capacity and readiness, @personal instructions, @consolation and comfort, @predictions and prophecies
